summary: Phase 6 Business Templates testing complete. All 6 pre-built industry prototypes (Restaurant, Dentist, Pharmacy, Pizza, Doctor, Skilled Trades) are working correctly. Backend: 11/13 tests passed (2 chat tests failed due to transient 502 LLM gateway error - not a code issue). Frontend: All template features working - sidebar branding, topbar, presentation screens, and pricing all update correctly when templates are applied.

minor.issue: Transient 502 BadGatewayError from LLM service during test - not a code bug, service recovered

success_rate.backend: 85% (11/13 tests passed - 2 failed due to transient LLM 502 error)

test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 Business Templates complete. All 6 templates tested and verified: 1) Restaurant (Desi Road - $799), 2) Dentist (Bright Smile Dental - $599), 3) Pharmacy (MedCare Pharmacy - $499), 4) Pizza (Slice House Pizza - $599), 5) Doctor (CarePlus Medical Clinic - $699), 6) Skilled Trades (ProFix Home Services - $499). Each template correctly updates: sidebar branding, topbar subtitle and tagline, all presentation screens (Problem, Solution, Features, Compare, Pricing), and the Active badge moves to the selected template.

backend: PUT /api/restaurant/default - All 6 templates can be applied ✓
POST /api/chat - Transient 502 error (LLM service issue, not code bug)

Click Dentist template → sidebar changes to 'Bright Smile Dental' ✓
Click Dentist template → topbar shows 'DENTAL CLINIC — DEMO' ✓
Click Dentist template → Problem screen shows dental-specific content ✓

Click Doctor template → sidebar changes to 'CarePlus Medical Clinic' ✓
